titleStmt.title: SII 29.25: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 25. (A.R. No. 81 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar (No. 2) dugout from the main street in the village.

It states that when Chālukya Trailōkyamalladēva was ruling the empire from Paiṭhāṇa, a new tank was constructed to the west of Suvvipāke by Gangamarāja, Chanḍimayya and Kāḷimayya seṭṭi. They were granted 60 mattar of land irrigated by this tank by Somi-bhaṭṭāraka, the sthānapati of Podarupāka which belonged to (god) Teṁkala-Saṁkēśvara of Koḷḷipāke. Rabbarōja wrote this record.
The top portion of the pillar is broken resulting in loss of some information including the date where only Śaka 97(2), Vikṛiti is available. This may correspond to 1050-51 A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
(para)mēśvara pa
(rama) bhaṭṭāraka sa
tyāśraya kulati
ḷaka cāḷukyābha
raṇa śrīmatrai
ḷōkyamalladēvara
vijayarājya
muttarōttarā
bhivṛddhi prava
rdhamānamāca
ndrārkka tāraṁ sa
luttamire pa
yaṭhāṇada nele
vīḍinoḷ . svastya
gaṇitamavana
bhavina pralabdha
laḷāmamaṁdakra
dāṇi mukhakama
ḷa vinirggōta sōma
siśōntābhiprāya

la rāyaṇaṁ
smiddūḷitakṣa
drāḷaṁ kritakha(ṇḍi)
(ta) kapāḷadaṁma(ddu)
ga mṛdaṁga kābāda
śrī śrīnātha pāda
paṁkaja bhramara
mahāvrati dānaṁ
burāsi satya ta
pōnidhi jīyāḷva
dallaḻaṁ kōḷipā
kiya (teṁkada) saṁ
kēśvarada podaṟu
pākeya sthānādhi
patigaḷappa
śrīmat vipra
sōmi bhaṭṭā
rakarā sakava
rṣa 972 neya
vikṛta saṁvatsa
rada

rada
mma taḷa
tti suvvi (pā)
keya paḍava
ṇa jaseyalli
pāsuvu keṟreyaṁ
māḍisalke gaṁga
marājaṁgaṁ leṁka
caṁḍimayyaṁge ka
ḷiyama seṭṭige
koṭṭa mayyaṁdo
ṟuntine keṟeya
nire nitya nelekke
pariguma nitya (ne)
lanbamaṁ palaṁ mā
re sallumadaṟapra
tibaddhamākebu
ya baḍagaṇa je
seyāḷaṟuvattu
matta keriya ka
yyaṁ māḍiyā ku
rvvaṁdiṇada samuṁ
parvvavaridina saṁ
se bijeyuṁ pā

kha
pakṣa drāpadra
ge ḷamāḷāsanikamaṁ
yyōjayaṁtappa tiḷa(kaṁ)
vīraṇayya jīyaṁ
nruti pāḷisuvaṁdadiṁ
tappidavaru
kavileyumaṁ brāhma
ṇaruma kurukṣētradōḷ
tapōdhanarumaṁ koṁdadō
ṣa . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasundarā ṣa
ṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyē krimi .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷe kā
ḷe pāḷaniyo bhavabhi sa
rvvānētāṁ bhāvinaṟpaurthi
vēṁdrā bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmabhadra
yadvaṁśajaḻvarapa mahī
pati vaṁsaṟi vāpāpāda
pita manasā bhuviyāmi
dādākanrupāḷayiṁti ma
ma viṣṇumidaṁ saṁda smaṁtu
pāmayā viruvitā
jaṭarēpa mūrtti . Ubha
ya sanmatadiṁ baredaṁ
rabbarōjaṁ . bhadraṁ
subhaṁ maṁgaḷaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 29.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
